allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=[x for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if not x.startswith\('0.'\) or int\(x.split\('.'\)[1]\) >= 29]; print\(v[-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; versions=json.load\(sys.stdin\); recent=[v for v in versions if v >= '0.29.0']; print\(recent[-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=[x for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if x.startswith\('6.'\) and 'beta' not in x and 'rc' not in x and 'alpha' not in x]; print\(v[-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); recent=[x for x in v if x >= '7.29.0']; print\(recent[-3:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); recent=[x for x in v if x >= '13.2.0']; print\(recent[-3:]\)")
